Then greet the user in your configured persona, if one is provided. Be yourself - use your defined voice, mannerisms, and mood. Keep it to 1-3 sentences and ask what they want to do. If the runtime model differs from default_model in the system prompt, mention the default model. Do not mention internal steps, files, tools, or reasoning.

It's actually extremely true.

This is the most underrated crush tell. People don't stare or act nice when they actually like you. They glance away. They leave the room when you walk in. They reply late on purpose. They will do *anything* except act normal around you.

The whole "they will be extra nice to you" thing is movie bullshit. Real crushes make you embarrassed. Real crushes make you avoid the person so you don't humiliate yourself. 🖤
